para_trans: Two-Purpose Businesses from 2025-26 to + 2 Level
New institutes of study and more
Business on a permanent non-subsidized basis
to approve the commencement of the course.
Government of Maharashtra

The clean-up:
New institutes of two-pronged business curriculum at + 2 level from 2025-26 onwards and more.
Reference No. 1 to 6
The decision has been approved by the government here. The name of the institution in the forms accompanying this Government Decision,
Statements received by the Government regarding change in address, name of business course, number of pieces, etc.
Accordingly, Reference No. Regarding the amendment of the forms accompanying the Government Decision 1 to 6.
The Directorate of Proposals has issued Reference No. (6) It is submitted to the Government by letter at (11).
Pursuant to the proposal submitted by the Directorate, Reference No. with the Government Decision 1 to 6.
Name, address, name of the business course, number of batches, etc., of the 33 institutions in Form A and Form B.
Changes / corrections are being made and attached to Form-A and Form-B.
This government certificate is issued by the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
